CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Aug-09-2022 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Notice having been given and there being no appearance or objection filed, the Court orders the case dismissed pursuant to California Rules of Court Section 3.1385. JUDGE: SAMUEL K. FENG; Clerk: JLee; Proceedings not reported.
